message:
feat(index): add vector index tracking fields and soft-delete rollback regression test

Extend FusedHit and ScoredResult types with optional internal vector index
tracking (semantic_index: Option<u32>, index: Option<u32>) for improved
result provenance. Add comprehensive regression test verifying that main
index tombstones are properly rolled back when soft-delete encounters WAL
write failures, ensuring data consistency during concurrent operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
